phrases.intent_en: Ask what the entry fee is for the convent
phrases.text_local: Quel est le tarif d'entrée du couvent ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh luh tah-REEF dahn-TRAY doo koo-VAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Couvent des Jacobins charges a modest entry fee.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket desk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the relics of Saint Thomas Aquinas are here
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que les reliques de Saint Thomas d'Aquin sont conservées ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh lay ruh-LEEK duh san toh-MAH dah-KAN son kohn-sair-VAY ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The relics of Saint Thomas Aquinas have rested in the Jacobins church since 1369, under the high altar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a cloister garden to visit
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un jardin du cloître ouvert aux visiteurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un zhar-DAN doo KLWAH-truh oo-VAIR oh vee-zee-TUR
phrases.cultural_note: The Jacobins' Gothic cloister with its elegant twin columns is one of the most photographed cloisters in France.

responses.english: Yes, the cloister is accessible with the ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee luh KLWAT-ruh eh tak-ses-EEBL ah-VEK luh bee-YAY
responses.local: Oui, le cloître est accessible avec le billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if concerts are held in the nave
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que des concerts ont lieu dans la nef du couvent ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh day kohn-SAIR ohn LYUH dahn lah NEF doo koo-VAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Piano aux Jacobins festival, held every September, brings world-class pianists to perform in the extraordinary acoustic of the nave.

responses.english: You need to check the programme on the website.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-FYAY luh proh-GRAM soor luh SEET
responses.local: Il faut vérifier le programme sur le site.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets for the Piano aux Jacobins festival
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on acheter des billets pour le festival Piano aux Jacobins ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON ash-TAY day bee-YAY poor luh fes-tee-VAL pyah-NOH oh zhah-koh-BAN
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets for Piano aux Jacobins sell quickly; it is advisable to book online well in advance of the September festival.

responses.english: At the convent ticket desk or online.
responses.phonetic: oh gee-SHAY doo koo-VAHN oo ahn LEE-nyuh
responses.local: Au guichet du couvent ou en ligne.
